texto: Does drinking make you wittier? One might as well ask if witting makes you drinkier, which it may.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Benjamin Errett que provoca temas ligados a reflexao. Ao questionar “Does drinking make you wittier? One might as well ask if witting makes you drinkier, which it may.”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, drinking, drinking-alcohol, com foco em drinking-alcohol e wit.

texto: Wit is the thought process that generates truly funny observations, as well as the most incisive comments, lasting quips, and brilliant asides. To say wit is mean is like saying the sun is mean for burning you: The giant ball of hot plasma at the center of our solar system is bigger than that, and why weren't you wearing sunscreen in the first place?
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Benjamin Errett: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Wit is the thought process that generates truly funny observations, as well as the most incisive …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, wit, thought pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
